name: Michele's Triple c Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, sugar and brown sugar until well-blended.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, blending well.
3. Mix in vanilla.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda and salt.
5. Add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture. Stir until mixed.
6. Add chocolate chips and pecans.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 minutes.
